_comment: Tier-2 Layer-C: skfem linear_elasticity numerical-correctness gate. Cross-backend mirror of fenics elasticity_mms_convergence — same manufactured u = (sin(πx)·sin(πy), sin(2πx)·sin(2πy)), same plane-strain E=1.0/ν=0.3, but DIFFERENT catalog API: MeshTri.refined + ElementVector(ElementTriP1()) + BilinearForm with sym_grad + trace + ddot + LinearForm with f = -μ·Δu - (λ+μ)·grad(div(u)) computed analytically (vs UFL-symbolic auto-derive in fenics). Asserts P1 h=1/32 L2 error <= 1.3e-2 and P1 EOC h=1/16 → h=1/32 in [1.7, 2.3]. CROSS-BACKEND NUMERICAL AGREEMENT with fenics: skfem P1=8.96e-3 vs fenics P1=8.99e-3 (0.3% diff); skfem EOC=1.924 vs fenics EOC=1.925 (identical to 3 sig figs). Verified against skfem 12.0.1 on 2026-06-01.
